phrases.intent_en: Ask which bus goes to the Matisse Museum from the centre
phrases.text_local: Quel bus faut-il prendre depuis le centre-ville pour aller au Musée Matisse ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel BOOS foh-TEEL PRAN-dreh deh-PWEE leh SAN-treh-VEEL poor ah-LAY oh moo-ZAY mah-TEES
phrases.cultural_note: The Matisse Museum is in Cimiez, a hilltop neighbourhood. Bus lines 15, 17, and 20 serve the area from the city centre.

responses.english: Take bus fifteen from the centre.
responses.phonetic: pruh-NAY luh BOOS KAHNZ duh-PWEE luh SAHN-truh
responses.local: Prenez le bus quinze depuis le centre.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a combined ticket with other Nice museums
phrases.text_local: Il y a un billet combiné avec d'autres musées de Nice ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel ee ah uhn bee-YAY kohm-bee-NAY ah-VEK DOH-truh moo-ZAY duh NEESS
phrases.cultural_note: Nice offers museum passes that cover multiple sites. Ask at any museum ticket desk about multi-site options.

responses.english: Yes, there is a multi-museum pass.
responses.phonetic: wee eel ee ah uhn PASS mool-tee-moo-ZAY
responses.local: Oui, il y a un pass multi-musées.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the cut-out works (papiers découpés) are on permanent display
phrases.text_local: Les papiers découpés de Matisse font-ils partie de la collection permanente ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay pah-PYAY day-koo-PAY deh mah-TEES fon-TEEL par-TEE deh lah ko-lek-SYON pehr-mah-NANT
phrases.cultural_note: The paper cut-outs (papiers découpés) are among Matisse's most celebrated works, created when he was bedridden in his 70s.

responses.english: Yes, they are on permanent display.
responses.phonetic: wee eel sohn tahn ex-poh-zee-SYOHN pair-mah-NAHNT
responses.local: Oui, ils sont en exposition permanente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for the museum's opening hours
phrases.text_local: Quels sont les horaires d'ouverture du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son lay o-REHR doo-vehr-TOOR doo moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Matisse Museum is closed on Tuesdays. It is set within the beautiful Cimiez gardens near Roman ruins.

responses.local: De dix heures à dix-huit heures.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a bookshop in the museum
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a une librairie dans le musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess keel ee ah oon lee-bray-REE dahn luh moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: Museum bookshops in France often carry exhibition catalogues, postcards, and art books that make good souvenirs.
